_meta.note: Capybara Go Skill-Tierliste. Community-Quelle: allclash (S+..D) + meowdb (Skills nach Waffentyp) + game-vault. cat nutzt die Build-prefs (builds.json), damit der gewählte Build die Bewertung anpasst. Tier->Score: S+=100,S=92,A=78,B=58,C=40,D=18. match = Such-Phrasen DE+EN (deutsche Skill-Namen teils best-effort; Effekt-Stichwörter fangen den Rest).

skills.note_de: Top-Skill: +ATK pro Runde, skaliert in langen Kämpfen. Fast immer lernen.
skills.note_en: Top skill: +ATK each round, scales in long fights. Almost always learn.

skills.note_de: Stapelt Schadensreduktion (bis 75%). Top, vor allem früh/mittel.
skills.note_en: Stacks damage reduction (up to 75%). Top, especially early/mid.

skills.note_de: Viel mehr LP -> stärkere Heilung/Schilde. Sehr solide.
skills.note_en: Big HP boost -> stronger heal/shield. Very solid.

skills.note_de: Top in Kombo-/Basisangriff-Builds. Extra Basisangriffe + ATK bei Kombo.
skills.note_en: Top in combo/basic-attack builds. Bonus basic attacks + ATK on combo.

skills.note_de: Top in Krit-Builds. Extra Angriffe + ATK bei Krits.
skills.note_en: Top in crit builds. Bonus attacks + ATK on crits.

skills.note_de: Stark in Blitz-Builds (Nashir): senkt Gegner-Wut. Sonst Nische.
skills.note_en: Strong in lightning builds (Nashir): cuts enemy rage. Niche otherwise.

skills.note_de: Gibt Krit-, Kombo- und Konter-Rate. Breit nützlich.
skills.note_en: Grants crit, combo and counter rate. Broadly useful.

skills.note_de: Verdoppelt Dolche. Top in Dolch-/Kombo-Builds (Whisperer).
skills.note_en: Doubles daggers. Top in dagger/combo builds (Whisperer).

skills.note_de: Dolche laden schneller. Stark in Dolch-Builds.
skills.note_en: Daggers recharge faster. Strong in dagger builds.

skills.note_de: Senkt Gegner-ATK (20-35%). Stark defensiv/Kontrolle.
skills.note_en: Reduces enemy ATK (20-35%). Strong defensive/control.

skills.note_de: Mehr Kombo-Rate = mehr Basisangriffe. Top in Kombo-Builds.
skills.note_en: More combo rate = more basic attacks. Top in combo builds.

match: dolch mit einer chance die wut
skills.note_de: Wirft Dolche (+Wut) -> mehr Dolche = mehr Angriffe. Top in Dolch-Builds (Whisperer); auch in Wut-Builds gut.
skills.note_en: Throws daggers (+rage) -> more daggers = more attacks. Top in dagger builds (Whisperer); also good in rage builds.

skills.note_de: Eisstachel-Kontrolle (Stun-Lock) bei vielen Stacheln. Nische.
skills.note_en: Icy-spike control (stun-lock) with many spikes. Niche.

skills.note_de: Starke Schadensreduktion (weniger Schaden). Mit Kriegsveteran top.
skills.note_en: Heavy damage reduction (less damage). Great with War Veteran.

skills.note_de: Stapelt Kombo-Rate (bis 2 Kombos). Stark in Kombo-Builds.
skills.note_en: Stacks combo rate (up to 2 combos). Strong in combo builds.

skills.note_de: ATK/LP/VTDG-Bonus (15-25%). Breit nützlich.
skills.note_en: ATK/HP/DEF bonus (15-25%). Broadly useful.

skills.note_de: Mehr Konter + Lebensraub. Top in Konter-Builds (Mushroom).
skills.note_en: More counters + lifesteal. Top in counter builds (Mushroom).

skills.note_de: Verdoppelt Blitze. Nur Blitz-Builds (Nashir).
skills.note_en: Doubles lightning. Lightning builds only (Nashir).

skills.note_de: Senkt Gegnerschaden (eigener Multiplikator). Defensiv stark.
skills.note_en: Lowers enemy damage (separate multiplier). Strong defensive.

skills.note_de: Schnellerer Wut-Aufbau. Stark in Wut-Builds.
skills.note_en: Faster rage buildup. Strong in rage builds.

skills.note_de: Schadensreduktion (25-40%). Solide defensiv.
skills.note_en: Damage reduction (25-40%). Solid defensive.

skills.note_de: Krit-Rate. Gut für Krit-Builds.
skills.note_en: Crit rate. Good for crit builds.

skills.note_de: Weicht manchmal Angriffen aus. Solider Survival-Skill.
skills.note_en: Sometimes negates attacks. Solid survival skill.

skills.note_de: Schild bei Basisangriffen (5% LP). Gut für Basisangriff-Builds.
skills.note_en: Shield on basic attacks (5% HP). Good for basic-attack builds.

skills.note_de: Schild aus Wut (10% LP). Stark in Wut-Builds + Survival.
skills.note_en: Shield from rage (10% HP). Strong in rage builds + survival.

skills.note_de: Zweite Wut-Auslösung (braucht viel Wut). Situativ.
skills.note_en: Second rage activation (needs lots of rage). Situational.

skills.note_de: Mehr Konter-Chance. Mit anderen Konter-Skills.
skills.note_en: More counter chance. With other counter skills.

skills.note_de: +25-40% Basisangriff-Schaden. Gut für Basisangriff-Builds.
skills.note_en: +25-40% basic attack damage. Good for basic-attack builds.

skills.note_de: Mehr Skill-Schaden, aber Kombo/Konter-Rate sinkt. Nur Skill-Builds.
skills.note_en: More skill damage but lowers combo/counter. Skill builds only.

skills.note_de: Heilung bei Dolchtreffer. Gut mit vielen Dolchen.
skills.note_en: Heal on dagger hit. Good with many daggers.

skills.note_de: +30% Wut-Skill-Schaden. Gut in Wut-Builds.
skills.note_en: +30% rage skill damage. Good in rage builds.

skills.note_de: Großer ATK-Schub auf LP-Kosten. Nur wenn Survival passt.
skills.note_en: Big ATK at HP cost. Only when survival is fine.

skills.note_de: Einmaliger Schild bei wenig LP. Mittendrin unzuverlässig.
skills.note_en: One-time shield at low HP. Unreliable mid-fight.

skills.note_de: Mehr Basisangriff-Schaden. Okay, aber rundenbasierte Boosts sind besser.
skills.note_en: More basic attack damage. Okay, but per-turn boosts are better.

skills.note_de: Heilung bei Krits. Solide in Krit-Builds.
skills.note_en: Healing on crits. Solid in crit builds.

skills.note_de: Bonus erst unter 50% LP – unzuverlässig (man will nicht low-HP sein). Eher meiden.
skills.note_en: Bonus only below 50% HP – unreliable (you don't want to be low). Rather avoid.

skills.note_de: Gift bei Angriffen – skaliert nur in Gift-/DoT-Builds, sonst schwach (z. B. Whisperer).
skills.note_en: Poison on attack – scales only in poison/DoT builds, weak otherwise (e.g. Whisperer).

skills.note_de: Wut zu Kampfbeginn – nur in Wut-Builds nützlich, sonst Lückenfüller.
skills.note_en: Rage at battle start – only useful in rage builds, otherwise filler.

skills.note_de: Blitze bei Wut-Auslösung – nur in Blitz-/Wut-Builds (Nashir), sonst meiden.
skills.note_en: Bolts on rage activation – only in lightning/rage builds (Nashir), avoid otherwise.

skills.note_de: Nur in reinen Basisangriff-Builds. Sonst schwach.
skills.note_en: Only in pure basic-attack builds. Weak otherwise.

skills.note_de: Pet-Schaden auf Krit-Kosten. Nische.
skills.note_en: Pet damage at crit-rate cost. Niche.

skills.note_de: Krit hoch, aber KEINE Wut mehr. Nur Nicht-Wut-Builds.
skills.note_en: High crit but NO rage. Non-rage builds only.

skills.note_de: Lebensraub – ohne mehrere Stapel unzuverlässig.
skills.note_en: Lifesteal – unreliable without multiple stacks.

skills.note_de: Nur erste Runde – schwach für lange Boss-Kämpfe.
skills.note_en: First round only – weak for long boss fights.

skills.note_de: Wird nach 5 Wut-Auslösungen schwach. Für lange Kämpfe schlecht.
skills.note_en: Weak after 5 rage activations. Bad for long fights.

skills.note_de: MEIDEN: viel Schaden unter 30% LP, aber du nimmst auch mehr Schaden.
skills.note_en: AVOID: big damage below 30% HP, but you take more damage too.

skills.note_de: Einmalige Wiederbelebung mit wenig LP – zu schwach.
skills.note_en: One-time revival at low HP – too weak.

skills.note_de: Nur ein garantierter Konter pro Kampf. Schwach.
skills.note_en: Only one guaranteed counter per fight. Weak.

skills.note_de: Lichtspeer-Synergie – wird kaum gebaut.
skills.note_en: Light-spear synergy – rarely built.
